---
title: "American Beekeeping Federation Conference"
date: 2025/1/20
categories: 
- outreach
- Reno
- general public

---
<img src="../images/beeexpo.jpeg" alt="VP showing native pollinators" width="300" height="400">
<a href = "https://www.unr.edu/nevada-today/news/2025/beekeeping-conference-outreach">News article</a>
